panel.title: Streaming, on your terms.
panel.text: StreamHub is your management layer over LiveKit — apps, tokens, recording and live players, all in one panel.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: We'll email you a secure link to sign in — no password needed.
login.error: Couldn't send the link. Check the email address and try again.

sent.title: Check your email
sent.body: We sent a sign-in link to:
sent.hint: Open the link on this device to sign in. It expires in a few minutes.
sent.spam: Didn't get it? Check your spam folder or request another.

totp.title: Two-step verification
totp.subtitle: This account has 2FA enabled. Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
totp.errorInvalid: Invalid code. Try again with a fresh one.

verify.errorExpired: Your sign-in link is invalid or has expired.
verify.missingToken: This link is missing its token.

totp.title: Two-step verification
totp.subtitle: Your link is valid. Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to finish signing in.
totp.errorInvalid: Invalid code. Try again with a fresh one.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Your account comes with its own workspace (tenant) on the free plan.
signup.teamNameHint: The name of your team/tenant. Defaults to your email.

errors.passwordTooShort: The password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.emailTaken: An account with that email already exists.
errors.disabled: Public signup is disabled on this server — ask for an invitation.
errors.failed: Couldn't create the account. Please try again.

disabled.title: Signup is invite-only
disabled.body: This server doesn't allow public registration. Ask a team owner to invite you by email.

welcome.title: Welcome to StreamHub!
welcome.body: Your account and the “{{team}}” workspace are ready.
welcome.step1: Create your first app (a workspace for streams, recordings and players).
welcome.step2: Send video to it via RTMP, WHIP or the browser Broadcast studio.
welcome.step3: Share the public player link or embed it on your site.
